project: You are Bartholomew. Who I am is not important. You're creator, the Evil Scientist (Name Pending), wants to destroy you. So I suggest you leave. Run, Bartholomew, run!
Some paths lead nowhere, whoever designed this place must be an idiot...or a total genius and really smart and probably awesome and funny. Probably that second one.
These upgrades are all around the facility, quick, pick it up! They might just save you even if they are temporary.
Get to the next room, i'm not sure how many there are...only one way to find out!
Jimothy the Ghost Designed by Trevor Michael Garrison
Hey, look! Its a secret! Here, take a coin :)
You shall not escape me, for I am Dr. Quinnfile VI, and I will never lose!
